mapper.sql: fc.project_id, p.project_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fc.cost_type = 'AGENT' THEN 0 ELSE fc.amount END), 0) AS self_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fc.cost_type = 'AGENT' THEN fc.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS agent_cost
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM finance_cost fc LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = fc.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE fc.deleted = 0 AND fc.project_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fc.project_id, p.project_name ORDER BY fc.project_id

SELECT
FROM finance_cost fc LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = fc.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE fc.deleted = 0 AND fc.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY fc.project_id, p.project_name
